indicators.name: large drafting tables
indicators.rationale: Large drafting tables are designed for technical work, not social interaction.

indicators.name: lack of seating
indicators.rationale: No seating available for multiple people to sit and converse.

indicators.name: no central shared surface
indicators.rationale: No central coffee table or similar shared surface for placing drinks and conversation props.

indicators.name: no lighting fixtures
indicators.rationale: No lighting fixtures suggest a lack of ambient lighting suitable for a casual hangout.

indicators.name: no layout conducive to conversation
indicators.rationale: No layout that encourages a sociopetal arrangement for conversation.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is marginally adequate for casual conversation / hangout due to the lack of seating, central shared surfaces, and appropriate lighting. The large drafting tables and lack of layout conducive to conversation make it less suitable for a social hangout compared to a living room or similar space.
